# OP Gestion Financière Stratégique

> Independent wealth management and financial planning practice led by Olivier Pastorel, based in Beloeil, Quebec. Registered with the Autorité des marchés financiers (AMF) — not affiliated with any bank or insurer, so recommendations are made without conflict of interest.

Five areas of expertise under one advisor: investment, retirement planning, insurance, tax planning, and estate planning. Bilingual service (French/English), adapted to the Quebec reality. First meeting is free, roughly 45–60 minutes, no obligation.

## Services

- Investment planning
- Retirement planning
- Insurance
- Tax planning
- Estate planning

## Company

- [Homepage](https://www.opgestionfinancierestrategique.ca): Overview of services and approach.
- [Contact / Book a Meeting](https://www.opgestionfinancierestrategique.ca/contact): Free, no-obligation first meeting.
- Advisor: Olivier Pastorel, Représentant autonome, registered with Cloutier Groupe Financier (courtier en épargne collective), AMF registration 212465.
- Location: 1-45 rue Rémi Dansereau, Beloeil, QC J3G 0N6.
- Contact: olivier.pastorel@opgestionprivee.ca · 514-443-2335
